message.text:
Known ENTITIES:
@entities

Known AXIOMS:
@known

Read @input again.
Return only additional AXIOMS missing from the known set.
If none are missing, return [].

Return JSON array only.
Rules:
- do not repeat known axioms
- do not add hypotheses
- short atomic checks
